replies.msg:
In case of need ...

I don't have a subscription, but I read the first few lines.
https://foreignpolicy.com/2020/01/25/wuhan-coronavirus-safety-china/

Her idea: gloves, not masks. Only works if you're not in a crowded place. She suggests keeping 1.5m distance from others. My idea: if you run out of masks, or if you have a more private office etc, this may work.

- Wash your hands (or use sanitizer) and then put on clean gloves
- When you have to use your hands (like eating, going to toilet etc), take off the gloves. Immediately wash your hands before touching anything.
- When you are done, wash your hands and put the gloves back on.
- Wash the gloves with disinfectants daily

It is unclear how it works, but I tried for 1 hour. 10-15 times my nose and eyes were itchy but because of the gloves I did not rub my nose or eyes. I can type and write (with clean gloves), but I guess it is difficult to use the cell-phone (which you should keep clean, and use with clean hands). Not sure what to do in the dirtier public space (like a bus).

The mask stops the droplet from reaching your mouth and nose and face. I think the gloves stop you from moving any virus onto your mouth or nose or eyes by hand. Not perfect, but an additional measure (or a last resort if you run out of masks).

There are cheap thin cloth gloves, and use one color for clean, one color for dirtier situation ...

quote.msg:
In case of need ...

I don't have a subscription, but I read the first few lines.
https://foreignpolicy.com/2020/01/25/wuhan-coronavirus-safety-china/

Her idea: gloves, not masks. Only works if you're not in a crowded place. She suggests keeping 1.5m distance from others. My idea: if you run out of masks, or if you have a more private office etc, this may work.

- Wash your hands (or use sanitizer) and then put on clean gloves
- When you have to use your hands (like eating, going to toilet etc), take off the gloves. Immediately wash your hands before touching anything.
- When you are done, wash your hands and put the gloves back on.
- Wash the gloves with disinfectants daily

It is unclear how it works, but I tried for 1 hour. 10-15 times my nose and eyes were itchy but because of the gloves I did not rub my nose or eyes. I can type and write (with clean gloves), but I guess it is difficult to use the cell-phone (which you should keep clean, and use with clean hands). Not sure what to do in the dirtier public space (like a bus).

The mask stops the droplet from reaching your mouth and nose and face. I think the gloves stop you from moving any virus onto your mouth or nose or eyes by hand. Not perfect, but an additional measure (or a last resort if you run out of masks).

There are cheap thin cloth gloves, and use one color for clean, one color for dirtier situation ...

replies.msg:
This sounds like a solution for OCD rather than coronavirus

It’d have achieved the same effects if you would just keep your hands off your eyes and month, and sterilise your hands before and after dinning. Rather, the mask is there to prevent droplets from contacting your mouth. It’s essential for going outside public because you have mo ideas who’s contagious and the droplets are invisible. Anytime someone is taking or laughing you’re in the risk of being infected.

Just my 2 cents

手足裝備抗沙士：護目鏡 非常重要！分析文！大力推！
https://lih.kg/1845419
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區

https://www.facebook.com/112357283631796/posts/117867026414155/?d=n

手足裝備抗沙士：護目鏡
整體分析：https://www.facebook.com/112357283631796/posts/116690396531818/?d=n

首選：Sellstrom S80225/S80226 Wildland Fire Goggles （戴眼鏡都用得）
https://www.amazon.com/Sellstrom-Wildland-Goggles-Non-Vented-Anti-Fog/dp/B07DJVPL9Q

Sellstrom 依款眼罩，上年九月果陣，已經係前線手足標準裝備，有手足認證，包保放心！其中，依款眼罩有兩大特點。

第一，依款眼罩寫明係 non-vented，即係氣密。戴左之後，基本上就阻隔左外面嘅空氣進入眼罩，所以擋到TG，亦都擋到帶病毒嘅飛沫同空氣，乜春都入唔到眼。依個亦都係佢可以俾美國消防員救山火果陣用嘅原因。氣密係眼罩第一重要條件，如果唔係氣密，病毒同TG都可以經眼罩邊位入眼，大陸衛健委都講明病毒傳染性不斷上升，美國有教授都講左武漢沙士嘅reproductive rate 高過曬佢見過佢嘅病毒，證明今次係非常嚴重，必須要用高規格嘅產品保護自己！

第二，依款眼罩經過 ANSI Z87+ 嘅驗證，保護性極高！
ANSI Z87+嘅定義如下：
‘Each product must go through rigorous third-party testing which simulates hazards such as impact by flying objects and debris, high mass impact, and sharp object penetration. In each testing scenario, the lenses and frame must stay intact to pass’
根據網上一個對ANSI Z87+ 眼罩嘅測試，散彈槍都射佢唔穿，所以ANSI Z87+ 嘅standard 係非常高，亦都只有依種眼罩嘅保護性先可以保護前線免受橡膠子彈同布袋彈威脅。

次選：
Pyramex CAPSTONE (G504DT或其他型號）
https://www.amazon.com/Pyramex-Capstone-Direct-Indirect-Anti-Fog/dp/B003UUEW88

第一，依款眼罩有氣密帽，應該同樣做到氣密效果，但係因為佢嘅氣密帽可以拆卸，多左個連接位，所以氣密保護性會低小小（始終多個連接位就多個出錯機會）。
第二，依款眼罩經過D3 測試，證實可以防水滴同化學劑嘅飛淺，理論上有足夠防水性能。
第三，依款眼罩經過MIL-PRF 32432 美軍標準測試，對子彈衝擊力有一定防禦。

3M 1621 護目鏡

雖然唔係完全氣密，但係過左D3 test 同 ANSI Z87.1 （冇過plus 果個），對飛沫有一定預防能力，依幾日試過，除左大霧啲之外其他都ok, 包得幾好，重點係好便，五金舖$20-30 就有，性價比最高！


泳鏡（仲易買過平光鏡）

泳鏡顧名思義，就係for 遊水，氣密效果有一定嘅保證，同埋求其一間運動鋪都可以買到，買近視鏡嘅話眼睛都唔洗戴，幾十蚊就有，保護性一定好過平光鏡，不過如果係講嘢都要除口罩，放屁要除褲，戴左帽可能腦都用唔到嘅人，可能佢戴左就會睇唔野。

8.5 最新護目鏡實測 條帶戴高D 鼻位GAP就會消失!!! & 前線超過400位豬嘴實測
https://lih.kg/1411916

quote.msg:
In case of need ...

I don't have a subscription, but I read the first few lines.
https://foreignpolicy.com/2020/01/25/wuhan-coronavirus-safety-china/

Her idea: gloves, not masks. Only works if you're not in a crowded place. She suggests keeping 1.5m distance from others. My idea: if you run out of masks, or if you have a more private office etc, this may work.

- Wash your hands (or use sanitizer) and then put on clean gloves
- When you have to use your hands (like eating, going to toilet etc), take off the gloves. Immediately wash your hands before touching anything.
- When you are done, wash your hands and put the gloves back on.
- Wash the gloves with disinfectants daily

It is unclear how it works, but I tried for 1 hour. 10-15 times my nose and eyes were itchy but because of the gloves I did not rub my nose or eyes. I can type and write (with clean gloves), but I guess it is difficult to use the cell-phone (which you should keep clean, and use with clean hands). Not sure what to do in the dirtier public space (like a bus).

The mask stops the droplet from reaching your mouth and nose and face. I think the gloves stop you from moving any virus onto your mouth or nose or eyes by hand. Not perfect, but an additional measure (or a last resort if you run out of masks).

There are cheap thin cloth gloves, and use one color for clean, one color for dirtier situation ...

This sounds like a solution for OCD rather than coronavirus

It’d have achieved the same effects if you would just keep your hands off your eyes and month, and sterilise your hands before and after dinning. Rather, the mask is there to prevent droplets from contacting your mouth. It’s essential for going outside public because you have mo ideas who’s contagious and the droplets are invisible. Anytime someone is taking or laughing you’re in the risk of being infected.

Just my 2 cents

replies.msg:
"It’d have achieved the same effects if you would just keep your hands off your eyes and month, and sterilise your hands before and after dinning."

This is what the gloves are for -- reinforcement to break a bad habit ...
